title: More robust filters for navigation panel

posts.author: bmauch (Ben Mauch)
posts.cookedHtml:
When in the left hand navigation panel, under the workspace menu there is a filter option. It only offers to filter by board type, if you are a subscriber or owner, or for a dashboard.
It would be very helpful to be able to filter by columns of the boards such as owners, status, etc.
